sections.label: Technique
sections.placeholder: Multidetector CT of the chest acquired without intravenous contrast. Multiplanar reformats reviewed. State kVp/contrast volume/phase and DLP as per local dose policy.

sections.label: Comparison
sections.placeholder: Date and type of relevant prior imaging, if available.

sections.label: Findings
sections.placeholder:
Lungs and airways (each nodule with 3D size, attenuation type [solid / part-solid / pure ground-glass], solid-component size if part-solid, and Fleischner 2017 surveillance interval; consolidation, emphysema, fibrosis): 
Pleura (effusion, thickening, pneumothorax — note size/tension): 
Mediastinum and hila (nodes with short-axis size in mm): 
Heart and pericardium: 
Great vessels (calibre, aortic syndrome): 
Thoracic skeleton and chest wall: 
Upper abdomen (visualised):

sections.label: Impression
sections.placeholder: Concise, prioritised bulleted impression. Lead with the dominant nodule (3D size, solid/subsolid character, solid-component size) and the Fleischner 2017 follow-up category, then other significant findings; close with approved follow-up phrasing only.

sections.label: Recommendations
sections.placeholder: Evidence-based follow-up or correlation, drawn from approved phrasing, only if indicated.
